message:
test(readme): cover SqlInspector remaining 10 methods + promote inspect to prelude

Sister to fd90.9 / fd90.290. Extends readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite
with assertions for the rest of the SqlInspector surface plus the
module-level inspect() constructor:

- dialect_name()              → "sqlite"
- server_version()            → Some(...) (rusqlite override)
- max_identifier_length()     → call exercised
- table_exists("parent")      → true; ghost → false
- table_comment(...)          → None (sqlite has no column-comment storage)
- has_column(...)             → true on present; false on missing/ghost
- column(table, "id")         → SqlColumnSchema with primary_key_ordinal=Some(0)
- reflect_all_tables(None)    → bundles include both parent + child
- reflect_all_views(None)     → v_child reflected with non-empty columns
- inspect(&conn)              → free-fn constructor returns SqlInspector

Real defect found: inspect() was re-exported at the crate root but
absent from the prelude — the README documents it as paired with
SqlInspector (which is in the prelude). Promoted inspect to the
prelude alongside SqlInspector for surface consistency.

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.10.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"frankenpandas-fcck","title":"fp-frame DataFrame.ewm().sum() parity","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T10:05:40.874110086Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T10:08:25.035953995Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T10:08:25.034089546Z","close_reason":"Implemented DataFrameEwm::sum in commit d5d06b7, 2 tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90","title":"[EPIC] SQL backend abstraction — trait + PostgreSQL + MySQL","description":"Pandas-parity SQL IO across multiple backends. Today fp_io::read_sql / write_sql hardcode rusqlite::Connection; pandas read_sql/to_sql works with any SQLAlchemy-compatible engine (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, MS SQL, Oracle, ...). Multi-slice umbrella; file child beads per slice.

1. pub trait SqlConnection in fp-io (DBAPI2-like surface): execute_query(sql, params) -> RowIter, execute_statement(sql, params) -> usize, with_transaction<F>(f) -> Result<T>. Minimum surface to cover rusqlite, tokio-postgres, and mysql_async concrete backends behind the same trait.

2. Cargo features: sql-sqlite (default), sql-postgresql, sql-mysql. Each feature brings its backend crate and a wrapper impl SqlConnection for that backend's Connection type. Additive; disabling sql-sqlite drops the rusqlite dep.

3. read_sql / write_sql / read_sql_table / read_sql_query signatures move from rusqlite::Connection to <C: SqlConnection>. Existing SQLite call sites keep working because rusqlite::Connection gets the wrapper impl.

4. Param binding: closes frankenpandas-tk3k by letting the public surface accept params: &[&(dyn ToSqlBindable)] routed through each backend's type-specific binder.

5. chunksize streaming: read_sql(.., chunksize=Some(n)) returns impl Iterator<Item=Result<DataFrame, ...>> to match pandas.

6. coerce_float: read_sql(.., coerce_float=true) promotes NUMERIC / DECIMAL / MONEY to Float64 at row-materialization time.

7. Live-oracle conformance: packet fixtures per backend (sqlite/postgres/mysql) verifying round-trip parity with pandas' pd.read_sql(engine) for each.

Blocker for m3e8 closure: the README now honestly says 'SQL: SQLite-only via rusqlite; PostgreSQL/MySQL planned' (commit-pending, br-m3e8). Closing that qualifier requires this epic landing — at minimum slices (1)-(3).

Decomposition strategy: (1) is the keystone — pick between (a) a minimal DBAPI2-style trait sufficient to host all three backends without leaking backend-specific types into the public API, vs (b) a typestate / erased-impl approach. (2) feature-gates each backend behind Cargo features to keep binary size bounded. (4)-(7) then unblock incrementally behind (1)+(2)+(3).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-04-22T12:02:41.189776401Z","created_by":"cc-pandas","updated_at":"2026-04-24T00:21:21.081484312Z","close_reason":"Completed merge fuzz invariant hardening and clippy cleanup","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["backend-abstraction","epic","io","sql"]}

Include options support, umbrella re-exports, and focused fp-io tests for batching/options/zero chunksize.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:40:28.873856286Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:45:27.930495933Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:45:27.928679878Z","close_reason":"Completed in 805b307","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.1","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:40:28.873856286Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.10","title":"test(readme): cover SqlInspector remaining methods (table_comment, exists, version, has_column, column, reflect_all_*, inspect)","description":"Sister to fd90.9 / fd90.290 — covers the remaining ~10 SqlInspector / inspect entry points still uncovered by integration tests:

- table_comment(table, schema)
- table_exists(table, schema)
- server_version()
- max_identifier_length()
- dialect_name()
- has_column(table, col, schema)
- column(table, col, schema)
- reflect_all_tables(schema)
- reflect_all_views(schema)
- inspect(conn) free function

These all have public-API surface and back the README's introspection claim. Extend readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite (now uses parent/child schema from fd90.9) to call each and assert results.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:33:20.779907659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:33:53.921411440Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.10","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:33:20.779907659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.2","title":"fp-io read_sql_table chunksize helper","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table chunk helper for pandas-style read_sql_table(..., chunksize=...) on the existing SqlConnection surface. Reuse the table-name validation/escaping path, return SqlChunkIterator, expose the umbrella re-export, and add focused fp-io tests for batching and invalid chunksize/table names.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:46:41.440828863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:50:35.683429602Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:50:35.681545888Z","close_reason":"Completed in 693dc14","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.2","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:46:41.440828863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","title":"fp-io read_sql_table_columns chunksize helper","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table_columns chunk helper for pandas-style read_sql_table(..., columns=[...], chunksize=...) on the existing SqlConnection surface. Reuse table/column validation and projection query construction, return SqlChunkIterator, expose the umbrella re-export, and add focused fp-io tests for projection order, zero chunksize, and invalid projection inputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.073612091Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.071766828Z","close_reason":"Completed in 03a4ce7","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","title":"fp-io SQL chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine pandas-style chunksize with index_col promotion. Cover read_sql/read_sql_query/read_sql_table chunk paths by wrapping SqlChunkIterator, preserving per-chunk RangeIndex when index_col is None and promoting/removing the named column when set. Add umbrella re-exports and focused fp-io tests for query chunks, table chunks, None behavior, and missing index_col errors.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.040272870Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.038384696Z","close_reason":"Completed in 90fd549","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

@@ -383,6 +383,11 @@ pub mod prelude {
         SqlInspector,
         SqlReadOptions,
         SqlWriteOptions,
+        // fd90.10: inspect() is the documented convenience constructor
+        // for SqlInspector (fd90.38 / br-frankenpandas-szs9). It was

+        inspect,
         read_sql_chunks,
         SqlIfExists,
         // Module-level functions (concat + join/merge family)
